user.title: Choose setup type
user.description: ScorpionTrack can be connected either with your portal account for the richer integration or with a shared-location link for lightweight read-only tracking.

account.title: Add portal account
account.description: Enter your ScorpionTrack portal credentials. Account mode exposes the fuller set of trackers, sensors, and verified switches.

share.title: Add shared location
share.description: Paste either the full ScorpionTrack shared-location URL or just the token from it. A single share can include multiple vehicles.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed or the portal requested an unsupported extra authentication step.
error.share_unavailable: The shared location has expired, been revoked, or no longer returns data.
error.unexpected_response: ScorpionTrack responded in an unexpected way.

abort.already_configured: This ScorpionTrack source is already configured.
